com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class MiscSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings

  • public class MiscSettings
extends java.lang.Object
    Some settings for Pax devices.

      Screen timeout options in Settings

      • setHomeKeyEnable

        public static boolean setHomeKeyEnable(Context context,
                                       boolean enable)
        Enable/Disable the home key of Android System
        Parameters:
        context - app context
        enable - whether enable home key
        Returns:
        Whether set successfully

      • setRecentKeyEnable

        public static boolean setRecentKeyEnable(Context context,
                                         boolean enable)
        Enable/Disable the recent key of Android System
        Parameters:
        context - app context
        enable - whether enable recent key
        Returns:
        Whether set successfully

        public static boolean setStatusBarVisible(Context context,
                                          boolean visible)
        Visible/Invisible the status bar of Android System
        Parameters:
        context - app context
        visible - whether visible status bar
        Returns:

        Parameters:

      • isPowerKeyEnable

        public static boolean isPowerKeyEnable(Context context)
        Return whether power key enable. If unknown error occurs, it will return true. Then please check the log for reasons.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        whether power key enable

      • isHomeKeyEnable

        public static boolean isHomeKeyEnable(Context context)
        Return whether home key enable. If unknown error occurs, it will return true. Then please check the log for reasons.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        whether home key enable

        Return whether recent key enable. If unknown error occurs, it will return true. Then please check the log for reasons.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        whether recent key enable

        Return whether status bar visible. If unknown error occurs, it will return true. Then please check the log for reasons.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        whether status bar visible

        Return whether status bar enable. If unknown error occurs, it will return true. Then please check the log for reasons.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        whether status bar enable

        Return whether status bar enable. If unknown error occurs, it will return true. Then please check the log for reasons.

        Returns:
        whether status bar enable

      • setWifiHotspotSettingsEnable

        public static boolean setWifiHotspotSettingsEnable(Context context,
                                                   boolean enable)
        Enable/Disable the wifi hotspot Setting of Android System

        The following permission are required:
        android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE
        android.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE
        android.permission.CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE

        Parameters:
        context - app context
        enable - whether enable wifi hotspot
        Returns:
        Whether set successfully

      • isWifiHotspotSettingsEnable

        public static boolean isWifiHotspotSettingsEnable(Context context)
        Return whether wifi hotspot enable. If unknown error occurs, it will return true. Then please check the log for reasons.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        whether wifi hotspot enable

      • disablePosMenu

        public static boolean disablePosMenu(Context context,
                                     java.util.Map<POSMenu,java.lang.Boolean> disableMenu)
        Hide or show the system settings menu and quick settings switch.The call clears the effect of the last call.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        disableMenu - Menu collection.Map.key:Menu, POSMenu; Map.value: true means hide, false means show.
        Returns:
        Whether set successfully

      • setPhysicalKeyEnable

        public static boolean setPhysicalKeyEnable(Context context,
                                           boolean enable)
        Enable or disable physical keyboard if device has.
        Parameters:
        context - App content
        enable - true is enable; false otherwise
        Returns:
        Whether set successfully

      • setScreenOffTime

        public static boolean setScreenOffTime(Context context,
                                       MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime time)
        Set the screen off time. The time must be the duration included in the setting interface
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        time - MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime
        Returns:
        true - Set successfully
        false - Setting failed, the time must be the duration included in the setting interface.
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • getScreenOffTime

        public static int getScreenOffTime(Context context)
        Gets the set sleep time
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        Sleep time (ms)
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • addApns

        public static boolean addApns(Context context,
                              byte[] data)
        Add apn from XML file
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        data - Data obtained from the APN file. The file format is as follows:
        <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
        <apns version="8">
        <apn carrier="China Mobile"
        apn="cmnet"
        proxy=""
        port="80"
        user=""
        password=""
        server=""
        mmsc=""
        mmsproxy=""
        mmsport=""
        mcc="460"
        mnc="00"
        authtype="3"
        type="default"
        protocol="IPV4V6"
        roaming_protocol="IPV4V6"
        />
        <apn carrier="China MobileTTT"
        apn="cmnet"
        proxy=""
        port="80"
        user=""
        password=""
        server=""
        mmsc=""
        mmsproxy=""
        mmsport=""
        mcc="460"
        mnc="01"
        authtype="3"
        type="default"
        protocol="IPV4V6"
        roaming_protocol="IPV4V6"
        />
        </apns>
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • getApnList

        public static java.util.List<ApnInfo> getApnList(Context context)
        Gets the APN list
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        the APN list if it exists,otherwise return null
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • getCurrentApn

        public static ApnInfo getCurrentApn(Context context)
        Gets the current APN
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        the current APN if it exists,otherwise return null
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • removeApn

        public static boolean removeApn(Context context,
                                java.lang.String apnId)
        Remove APN from the database
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        apnId - The apnId to delete(id corresponding to "_id" field),it can be obtained by getCurrentApn or getApnList
        Returns:
        whether remove APN successfully
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • switchAPN

        public static boolean switchAPN(Context context,
                                java.lang.String newAPN,
                                java.lang.String userName,
                                java.lang.String passwd)
        Create a new APN and set it as the current APN
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        newAPN - A new APN(Modify the APN of access point in the settings interface)
        userName - New APN user name
        passwd - New APN password
        Returns:
        whether set APN successfully
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • switchAPN

        public static boolean switchAPN(Context context,
                                java.lang.String name,
                                java.lang.String newAPN,
                                java.lang.String userName,
                                java.lang.String passwd,
                                int authType)
        Create a new APN and set it as the current APN
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        name - Name of the new APN(Modify the name of access point in the settings interface)
        newAPN - A new APN(Modify the APN of access point in the settings interface)
        userName - New APN user name
        passwd - New APN password
        authType - 0: None 1: Pap 2: Chap 3: Pap or Chap
        Returns:
        whether set APN successfully
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • setMobileDataEnable

        public static boolean setMobileDataEnable(Context context,
                                          boolean enable)
        Enable or disable the mobile data network
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        Returns:
        Return true on success and false on failure.
        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • switchSimCard

        public static boolean switchSimCard(Context context,
                                    int num)
        Switch sim card to another.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        num - should be 1 or 2, only support two sim cards.
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.

      • setWifiStaticIp

        public static boolean setWifiStaticIp(Context context,
                                      WifiParam wifiParam)
        Set static ip address(wifi network must be connected)
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        wifiParam - Wifi Param
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.

      • setLanParam

        public static boolean setLanParam(Context context,
                                  LanParam param)
        Set Lan parameters.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        param - Lan Param
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.

      • setScreenSaver

        public static boolean setScreenSaver(Context context,
                                     java.lang.String pkg,
                                     java.lang.String component)
        Set up the screen saver
        Parameters:
        context - App context.
        pkg - The package name.
        component - The class name of the service.
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.
        Since:
        V1.12.00

      • getScreenSaver

        public static java.lang.String getScreenSaver(Context context)
        Gets the package name of the screensaver.
        Parameters:
        context - App context.
        Returns:
        The package name of the screensaver.
        Since:
        V1.12.00

      • enabledScreenSaver

        public static boolean enabledScreenSaver(Context context,
                                         boolean enabled)
        Set whether the screensaver is available.
        Parameters:
        context - App context.
        enabled - true is available; false unavailable.
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.
        Since:
        V1.12.00

      • setScreenSaverActivateType

        public static boolean setScreenSaverActivateType(Context context,
                                                 int type)
        Set the screen saver activation type.
        Parameters:
        context - App context.
        type -
        0: Activate when plugged into the base.
        1: Activate when charging.
        2: Activate when plugged into the base or when charging.
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.
        Since:
        V1.12.00

      • setUsbMode

        public static boolean setUsbMode(Context context,
                                 int mode)
        Set USB mode. To enable permission checking, add the following permissions to the AndroidManifest:"com.pax.permission.USB_SECURITY".
        Parameters:
        context - App context.
        mode -
        0: CHARGE_ONLY, indicates disabling adb and mtp.
        1: DEFAULT, indicates that default mode is enabled.
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.
        Since:
        V1.15.00

      • setBootAnimation

        public static boolean setBootAnimation(Context context,
                                       java.lang.String filePath)
        Set boot animation. Note: The resource file must have a firmware signature.
        Parameters:
        context - App context.
        filePath - The path of the boot animation resource file.
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.

      • setBootLogo

        public static boolean setBootLogo(Context context,
                                  java.lang.String filePath)
        Set boot logo. Note: The resource file must have a firmware signature.
        Parameters:
        context - App context.
        filePath - The path of the boot animation resource file.
        Returns:
        if success, return true, otherwise return false.
